title: psydrax odoratus
intro: Psydrax odoratus, also known as the 'Wild Jasmine', is a flowering plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Psydrax odoratus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of fever and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
